title: Fit test - 2nd screen "X" button
scenario: Fit Test results screen closes and returns to Device Settings when tapping the X button
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Locate and tap Fit Test option
On the first Fit Test screen, tap Start or Begin to run the fit test
Wait for the Fit Test to complete and results to display on the second screen (Fit Test results screen)
Tap the 'X' button on the Fit Test results screen
expected: The Fit Test results screen closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
